ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Captain of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Coach of the team */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home ground of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., ODI, T20, Test) */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "umpire1" TEXT /* Name of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2" TEXT /* Name of the second umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batting statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player in the match */,
  "out" INTEGER /* Number of times the player was out in the match */,
  "number_of_balls" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced by the player in the match */,
  "average" REAL /* Average runs scored by the player in the match */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player in the match */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit by the player in the match */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit by the player in the match */,
  "catches" INTEGER /* Number of catches taken by the player in the match */,
  "run-outs" INTEGER /* Number of run-outs by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_career_stats" (
  "career_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career batting statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player in their career */,
  "out" INTEGER /* Number of times the player was out in their career */,
  "number_of_balls" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced by the player in their career */,
  "average" REAL /* Average runs scored by the player in their career */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player in their career */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Total fours hit by the player in their career */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Total sixes hit by the player in their career */,
  "catches" INTEGER /* Total catches taken by the player in their career */,
  "run-outs" INTEGER /* Total run-outs by the player in their career */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("career_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_career_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_bowling_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bowling statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the player in the match */,
  "overs" INTEGER /* Number of overs bowled by the player in the match */,
  "maidens" INTEGER /* Number of maidens bowled by the player in the match */,
  "runs_conceded" INTEGER /* Total runs conceded by the player in the match */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_bowling_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_bowling_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_career_bowling_stats" (
  "career_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career bowling statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by the player in their career */,
  "overs" INTEGER /* Total overs bowled by the player in their career */,
  "maidens" INTEGER /* Total maidens bowled by the player in their career */,
  "runs_conceded" INTEGER /* Total runs conceded by the player in their career */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the player in their career */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("career_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_career_bowling_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
